sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Robot Master Weapons
special_mechanics.description: Player acquires special weapons from defeated Robot Masters that can be selected and used throughout the game with limited energy

special_mechanics.name: Support Items
special_mechanics.description: One or more support items aid player in reaching places unreachable by normal means; energy can be replenished by defeating enemies

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. No specific movement physics values documented in Wikipedia or accessible TCRF sources. Game is a compilation of remakes with glitch fixes and visual upgrades from originals. Battery back-up enabled continue feature (unlike NES originals with passwords). Sources available did not contain quantitative physics parameters.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Mega Man: The Wily Wars
